title: Gordanluk Low Flowerpot Rattan Designed Flowerpot with removable liner large plant pots indoor large plant pots outdoor plant pot flower pots (Black, 40 x 41.5 cm)
features: This classic rattan designed planter with a modern twist and sense of style is a perfect addition for any space in the house or garden, enhancing the décor of any area they are placed in.
Available in Four different colours – Black / Brown / Metallic Grey / White

External Dimensions : X Large: Height 41.5 cm, Width at Top 40 cm x 40 cm, Large: Height 31 cm, Width at Top 30 cm x 30 cm, Medium: Height 26 cm, Width at Top 25 cm x 25 cm and Small: Height 19.5 cm, Width at Top 19 cm x 19 cm. The generous capacity ensures you have enough space to create the perfect flower arrangement every time
Made in the EU from durable Polypropylene plastic. These pots are strong and resistant to adverse weather conditions, scratches and abrasions, and they are UV resistant and will not fade in the sun.
Would be a great birthday or house warming present/gift for your wife, husband, grandparents, girlfriend, boyfriend, nan, mum, dad
description: Create a modern contemporary look with these rattan designed low maintenance indoor or outdoor potted plant baskets and removable liners. Our range of plant pots come in four different sizes and four different colours (black, brown, metallic grey, and white). The two sizes the Planters are available in are X Large: Height 41.5 cm, Width at Top 40 cm x 40 cm Large: Height 31 cm, Width at Top 30 cm x 30 cm Medium: Height 26 cm, Width at Top 25 cm x 25 cm Small: Height 19.5 cm, Width at Top 19 cm x 19 cm These pots are ideal for a wide range of flowers and plants including orchids, hostas, lavenders, azaleas, cactus, aloe vera flowers or even artificial plants or bonsai. They can also be used to grow fruit, vegetables or herbs like strawberries, blueberries, tomatoes, mint or sage. Made in the EU, these square rattan designed shaped baskets are modern and stylish. They are made from durable polypropylene plastic which makes them strong and resistant to adverse weather conditions, scratches and abrasions, and they are UV resistant and will not fade in the sun. They also come with a removable liner. These modern and decorative baskets will enhance the décor of any area they are placed in be it indoors, outdoors, patio’s, balconies or roof tops. A plastic flowerpot is a great alternative to a heavy ceramic pot.
